commit.message: Added vercel configuration to rewrite server-side routes to the react router.
Added example for markup.
Fix website style.
Added content for markup and tags.
Added accessibility tools.
Added structure for future web development pages and changed theme again to better fit content.
Updated build with new overview page and website theme.
Undo previous commit to use with CF Pages.
Create CNAME

commit.message: Renamed export to docs for GH pages.
Added pages export.
Removed unused import from router.
Added explicit metadata to remaining routes to fix warnings/errors.
Fixed hideNav not working for the sidebar.
Added containers page and fetching from api.
Suppress pylance missing module warning (its wrong, im right)
Fix the model import again as imports are resolved from the locaiton of main.py.
Fix import error for router models.
Fix import error for containers router.
Moved models out of router into separate file.
Moved routers into their own feature folder.
Renamed dogger (docker) to containers.
Added creation and deletion endpoint for docker.
Fix serialization error when returning list of docker containers.
Added docker to the api.
Added explicit parameter labels.
Added container for system page to allow flex wrapping.
Moved disk usage label inside MeterGroup component and added max disk size label.
Added page metadata descriptions and navigation labels.
Changed sidebar menu item active color to match primevue.
Added disk usage.
Moved system resource component to system page and added usage prop to cpu usage.
Fixed sidebar and page sizing issues.
Added cpu cores and endpoint to gather all cpu information.
Added dynamic route/page navigation.
Added CPUUsage component and hooked it up to api.
Added primevue + chart.js for webapp.
Added tag for swagger.
Added unit field to response to indicate the unit size.
Forgot to git add router for last commit.
Renamed memory module to system and added disk usage to system module.
Removed redundant module.
Added router prefix for memory and additional free ram function.
Removed unused endpoints.
Added psutil module and memory router.
Added phosphor icons to webapp. Added pycache to gitignore for api.
Added FastAPI example code.
Fixed failed fastapi installation due to incorrect usage of exit status.
Added dependency check / installation for fastapi to environment setup script.
Added README.
Fix up sidebar menu item link to use router link.
Added vue-router and implemented sidebar and page content.
Added fastapi project.
Regenerated project with typescript support.
Removed example code.
Elevate echo for resolution configuration.
Added ads7846 device tree overlay configuration.
Added ads7846 script.
Forgot to git add for previous commit.
Removed unused setup script and moved debian based base script to folder.
Rename script to better reflect its future purpose.
Pass -y flag to apt install to stop blocking.
Added raspbery pi 5 bookworm setup script.
Removed .bash_profile overwrite.
